overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game showing a survivor with a backpack and weapons walking along a deserted highway. The scene features overcast skies, a prominent snow-capped mountain in the distance, abandoned vehicles, and transitions from a rural rest stop to a highway littered with wreckage.

leaving the gas station area and entering the open highway with mountain vista

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at an abandoned highway rest stop with a large wooden shelter. The character walks onto the asphalt road, passing an abandoned black SUV with its hood open. A snow-capped mountain dominates the distant background while power lines and pine trees frame the scene.

slight right turn following the curve of the highway

wooden telephone pole with power lines running along the highway
wooden post with directional signs pointing toward different routes

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open rural highway with the snow-capped mountain centered ahead. The road curves gently to the right past utility poles and a stop sign. The wooden shelter and transmission tower fade from view as the character progresses along the asphalt.

events.description: moving from asphalt road to dirt and gravel shoulder alongside the highway
approaching a major wreckage site with an overturned semi-truck blocking the road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt shoulder approaching a highway intersection, navigating around abandoned vehicles and wreckage

overturned semi-truck trailer blocking the highway ahead

entered.detail: large green highway gantry sign spanning across the road with directional information
large white trailer truck overturned on its side blocking the highway
dark blue cargo van parked on the roadside shoulder

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from asphalt to a dirt shoulder alongside the highway. A large overhead road sign becomes visible as the character approaches a major intersection. An overturned semi-truck and an abandoned blue van mark the entrance to a highway ramp, with the snow-capped mountain still visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, abandoned rest stop toward a wreckage-strewn highway intersection under a looming snow-capped mountain. It begins at a wooden shelter, following the character as they step onto the asphalt and pass a black SUV with its hood open. As the character progresses, the scene opens into a rural stretch of highway where the road curves gently past utility poles and a stop sign, leaving the shelter and transmission towers behind. The camera then shifts from the pavement to a dirt shoulder, approaching a large overhead road sign. Finally, the path leads toward a major intersection marked by an overturned semi-truck and an abandoned blue van at the entrance of a highway ramp.
